tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: These are the chords for Taylor Swift's new song "Gorgeous" from her album "reputation".

content:
[Intro]
[ch]F[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]              [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]Dm[/ch]                     [ch]Bb[/ch]
According to you, I'm stupid, I'm useless, I can't do anything right.[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]Dm[/ch]                   [ch]Bb[/ch]
According to you, I'm difficult, hard to please, forever changing my mind.[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]Dm[/ch]                     [ch]Bb[/ch]
   I'm a mess in a dress, can't show up on time, even if it would save my life.[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]Dm[/ch] (--> Solo)
According to you.         According to you.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]Dm[/ch]                         [ch]Dm/G[/ch]
But according to him, I'm beautiful, incredible, he can't get me out of his head.[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]Dm[/ch]                     [ch]Dm/G[/ch]
According to him, I'm funny, irresistible, everything he ever wanted.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]                               [ch]Dm[/ch]                         [ch]Dm/G[/ch]
Everything is opposite, and I don't feel like stopping it. Baby tell me what I got to lose.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bb[/ch]                          [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]Bb[/ch] (--> Solo)
He's into me for everything I'm not, according to you.[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]              [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]                         [ch]Bb[/ch]
According to you, I'm boring, I'm moody, you can't take me any place.[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]Dm[/ch]                   [ch]Bb[/ch]
According to you, I suck at telling jokes cause I always give it away.[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]Dm[/ch]                          [ch]Bb[/ch]
   I'm the girl with the worst attention span; you're the boy who puts up with it.[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]Dm[/ch] (--> Solo)
According to you.        According to you.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]Dm[/ch]                         [ch]Dm/G[/ch]
But according to him, I'm beautiful, incredible, he can't get me out of his head.[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]Dm[/ch]                     [ch]Dm/G[/ch]
According to him, I'm funny, irresistible, everything he ever wanted.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]                               [ch]Dm[/ch]                         [ch]Dm/G[/ch]
Everything is opposite, and I don't feel like stopping it. Baby tell me what I got to lose.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bb[/ch]                          [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]Dm[/ch] (--> Bridge)
He's into me for everything I'm not, according to you.[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                    [ch]Bb[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]
   I need to feel appreciated like I'm not hated. oh-- no--.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                [ch]Bb[/ch]                      [ch]Bb[/ch]                     [ch]Bb[/ch]
   Why can't you see me through his eyes?   It's too bad you're making me decide.[/tab]

[Solo]
[ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Dm/G[/ch]
[ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]Dm/G[/ch]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]              [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]Dm[/ch]                    ([ch]Bb[/ch])
According to me, you're stupid, you're useless, you can't do anything right. [/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]Dm[/ch]                         [ch]Dm/G[/ch]
But according to him, I'm beautiful, incredible, he can't get me out of his head.[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]Dm[/ch]                     [ch]Dm/G[/ch]
According to him, I'm funny, irresistible, everything he ever wanted.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]                               [ch]Dm[/ch]                         [ch]Dm/G[/ch]
Everything is opposite, and I don't feel like stopping it. Baby tell me what I got to lose.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bb[/ch]                          [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]Bb[/ch]
He's into me for everything I'm not, according to you. (you, you) According to you.[/tab]

[Outro] 
(acoustic guitar)
[tab]              [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]Bb[/ch]
According to you, I'm stupid, I'm useless, I can't do anything right.[/tab]
